name: maquette
kind: desktop-gui-app
category: game-asset-tool
language: rust
edition: 2021
version: 0.1.0
license: MIT
status: mvp

purpose: |
  Kit-based low-poly 3D asset forge for indie game developers.
  Users stack primitive blocks in a 3D viewport, arrange and paint them,
  then export glTF/OBJ models and batch-render 2D sprite sheets from
  multiple angles. Inspired by Kenney's Asset Forge.

binary_name: maquette
entry_point: src/main.rs
build: cargo build --release
run: cargo run

engine: bevy
engine_version: "0.18"
ui_library: bevy_egui
ui_library_version: "0.39"
ui_paradigm: immediate-mode
renderer: wgpu (via bevy)

dependencies:
  - bevy 0.18 (game engine, 3D rendering, ECS)
  - bevy_egui 0.39 (egui UI panels inside Bevy apps)
  - bevy_panorbit_camera 0.34 (orbit/pan camera for viewport)
  - bevy_infinite_grid 0.18 (ground grid with world axes)
  - serde 1 + serde_json 1 (future project file format)
  - thiserror 2 (error enum)
  - log 0.4 (logging interface)

api_conventions:
  event_system: bevy 0.17+ renamed Event -> Message; uses #[derive(Message)],
    MessageReader<T>, MessageWriter<T>, app.add_message::<T>().
  egui_schedule: EguiPrimaryContextPass (multi-pass mode).
  egui_plugin_init: EguiPlugin::default()
  egui_context_access: EguiContexts::ctx_mut() returns Result; use `?` in
    systems that return bevy::prelude::Result.
  ambient_light: insert_resource(GlobalAmbientLight { ... }) — not the older
    AmbientLight which is now a per-camera component.
  window_resolution: WindowResolution::new(width_u32, height_u32)
  mesh_material: spawn with (Mesh3d(handle), MeshMaterial3d(handle))
  camera_3d: spawn with Camera3d::default() + Transform (no bundle type).

module_layout:
  src/main.rs: app setup, plugin wiring
  src/camera.rs: pan-orbit camera spawn (Startup system)
  src/scene.rs: clear color, GlobalAmbientLight, directional light, infinite grid
  src/block.rs: BlockKind component/enum, SpawnBlockEvent, ClearSceneEvent,
    SelectedBlock resource, handle_spawn and handle_clear systems
  src/ui.rs: egui panels (top menu, left library, right properties, bottom status)

runtime_behavior:
  spawn_placement: staggered grid at y=0.5; col=(n%5)*1.4-2.8, row=(n/5)*1.4-2.0
  block_colors: round-robin through 6-color palette
  selected_block: resource holding Option<Entity>; set to latest spawn

implemented_features:
  - spawn primitives: Cube, Sphere, Cylinder, Cone, Plane, Torus
  - clear scene
  - orbit/pan/zoom camera
  - properties readout (position, rotation, scale) for selected block
  - block count status

unimplemented_features:
  - viewport pick/selection
  - transform gizmo
  - custom block import (user glTF/OBJ)
  - project save/load (.maq JSON)
  - glTF export
  - sprite sheet baking (multi-angle PNG)
  - procedural scripting (rhai or mlua)
  - undo/redo
  - reset camera action
  - grid toggle action

repo_position:
  monorepo: r_lit
  convention_exception: r_lit is for short-running CLI tools; maquette is
    a long-running desktop app, included here for shared build tooling.
  doc_files: README.md, README_CN.md, llms.txt, llms_cn.txt (per r_lit standard)

build_profiles:
  dev: opt-level=1 self, opt-level=3 deps (standard Bevy dev setup)
  release: lto=thin, codegen-units=1, strip=true, opt-level=3
